name: Great Elm Group, Inc.
description: Great Elm Group, Inc. is a diversified holding company that operates as an asset management firm. The company focuses on growing its asset management business by managing Great Elm Capital Corp. (NASDAQ: GECC), a business development company, and Great Elm Healthcare, LLC, among other investment vehicles. Great Elm Group seeks to build a platform of alternative asset management businesses, leveraging its capital and expertise to generate long-term shareholder value through opportunistic investments and strategic growth initiatives.
